instruction: The cloud service system, cloudbed-1, experienced two failures within the time range of March 21, 2022, from 01:00 to 01:30. For each failure, the root cause component, the exact root cause occurrence time, and the underlying reason are currently unknown. You are tasked with identifying, for EACH failure, the root cause component, the root cause occurrence datetime, and the root cause reason.
groundtruth:
answer 1: component=cartservice-0; reason=container network packet retransmission; datetime=2022-03-21 01:06:45
answer 2: component=productcatalogservice-2; reason=container read I/O load; datetime=2022-03-21 01:20:30
scoring_points:
The 1-th root cause occurrence time is within 1 minutes (i.e., <=1min) of 2022-03-21 01:06:45
The 1-th predicted root cause reason is container network packet retransmission
The 2-th root cause occurrence time is within 1 minutes (i.e., <=1min) of 2022-03-21 01:20:30
The 2-th predicted root cause reason is container read I/O load
